name: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk
summary: P.T. Metrodata Electronics Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the information communication and technology (ICT) business in Indonesia and internationally. The company's Distribution division sells hardware and software, and basic peripherals, such as data storage devices, terminals, memory, and peripherals. Its Solution division provides maintenance services; sells hardware, system management software, middleware, serverware, and system level software; and rents hardware and software products. The company's Consultation division provides professional services for consultation, implementation, and training; and sells software products. The company also offers business transformation solutions; assembly services in the computer field or wireless communication equipment area; and system integration services, as well as distributes information technology products and personal computer products. P.T. Metrodata Electronics Tbk was founded in 1983 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
